cast.name: 德西里亚·西亚汉 Desiree Siahaan

introduction: Fresh from gritty crime scenes, the bodies that land on a forensic pathologistâs table are usually that of those whose lives were ended prematurely for various reasons. While motionless, these bodies are filled with tales - tales that aid the deceased in their attempts to seek justice. Whispers of the Dead 2 features Dr Tatya, who in the course of her work, studies landmark cases solved by Singaporean Forensic Pathologist Prof. Chao Tzee Cheng and applies the wisdom gained from his experiences to aid her own investigations.刚从粗糙的犯罪现场出来，放在法医病理学家桌子上的尸体通常是那些因各种原因过早结束生命的人的尸体。这些尸体静止不动，却充满了故事——帮助死者寻求正义的故事。Tatya博士在工作过程中研究了新加坡法医病理学家Chao Tzee Cheng教授破获的具有里程碑意义的案件，并将从他的经历中获得的智慧用于帮助她自己的调查。
